examples.title: Input validation: read an integer between 1 and 10
examples.description: Demonstrates a while loop that repeats until a valid value is provided.
examples.pseudocode:
set value to an invalid number
while value is not between 1 and 10 (inclusive)
    prompt user for an integer 1..10
    read value
print value

examples.title: Sentinel-controlled sum
examples.description: Uses a while loop with a sentinel (-1) to sum inputs until termination.
examples.pseudocode:
initialize sum to 0
read number
while number is not -1
    add number to sum
    read next number
print sum

examples.title: Nested loops: multiplication table
examples.description: Shows nested for loops to generate a 2D table and demonstrates fencepost-aware formatting.
examples.pseudocode:
for row from 1 to R
    for col from 1 to C
        compute product = row * col
        print product with spacing (no trailing space at end of row)
    print newline
